introSection: Inferno is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Cinecittà World in Rome, Lazio, Italy. It is a Multi Dimensional Coaster from Intamin, similar to Thirteen at Alton Towers. The ride was previously known as Darkmare.
fullText: Inferno is a steel enclosed roller coaster located at Cinecittà World in Rome, Lazio, Italy. It is a Multi Dimensional Coaster from Intamin, similar to Thirteen at Alton Towers. The ride was previously known as Darkmare.
